{{Quote|Let the diplomats and politicians bicker in council. We're going to take back our planet with whatever force we can muster.|Veril Accama|<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Veril Acamma''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Sucharme]]. As a [[Major/Legends|major]] in charge of the [[Tallaga Garrison]]'s [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] wing, she helped lead the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] citizens in revolt of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] occupation some time prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].
